name: wc26-group-simulator
description: World Cup 2026 group-stage simulator — monorepo demo for JFrog Fly

scripts.build: npm run build -w @setecastronomy/wc26-standings-engine && npm run build -w @setecastronomy/wc26-results && npm run build -w @wc26/api && npm run build -w @wc26/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @setecastronomy/wc26-standings-engine && npm run test -w @setecastronomy/wc26-results
